channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Uniswap v2–v4 land on Linea zkEVM, expanding DEX access with native yield and ETH burn through Layer 2. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/uniswap-deploys-all-protocol-versions-consensys-linea-l2 #DeFi #Layer2 #Uniswap

item.title: 🔥 BNB stakers pulled dramatic idle-wins: 177% in 15 months, plus $553 per token if you held through 2024–25. https://Blockchain.News/news/bnb-holders-177-percent-returns-launchpool-airdrops-2024 #BNB #Crypto #Launchpool
